channel.title: Archiv für Geschichte der Philosophie
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Archiv für Geschichte der Philosophie

item.title: Socrates on Cookery and Rhetoric
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2023-0092

item.title: Idealism and Greek Philosophy: What Natorp Saw and Burnyeat Missed
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2022-0098

item.title: A Mereological Reading of the Dictum de Omni et Nullo
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2023-0101

item.title: Spinoza’s Re-Evaluation of Humility
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2023-0028

item.title: Incentives of the Mind: Kant and Baumgarten on the Impelling Causes of Desire
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2022-0108

item.title: Active Forgetting and Healthy Remembering in Nietzsche
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2023-0065

item.title: Striker, Gisela. From Aristotle to Cicero: Essays on Ancient Philosophy. Oxford: Oxford University Press 2022, x + 249 pp.
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2024-0009

item.title: Boeker, Ruth. Catharine Trotter Cockburn. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press 2023, 74 pp.
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2024-0008

item.title: Browning, Gary. Iris Murdoch and the Political. Oxford: Oxford University Press 2024, vi + 221 pp.
item.description: Article by Cathy Mason DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/agph-2024-0011
